mapper.select:
SELECT IFNULL(CREATE_DATE, ADDDATE(CURRENT_DATE(), -#{each})) CREATE_DATE , IFNULL(AVG(TEMPERATURE), 0) AS AVG_TEMP , IFNULL(MAX(TEMPERATURE), 0) AS MAX_TEMP , IFNULL(MIN(TEMPERATURE), 0) AS MIN_TEMP FROM fan_function WHERE TO_CHAR(CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = ADDDATE(CURRENT_DATE(), -#{each})
ORDER BY CREATE_DATE ASC

SELECT IFNULL(CREATE_DATE, ADDDATE(CURRENT_DATE(), -#{each})) CREATE_DATE , IFNULL(AVG(HUMIDITY), 0) AS AVG_HUM , IFNULL(MAX(HUMIDITY), 0) AS MAX_HUM , IFNULL(MIN(HUMIDITY), 0) AS MIN_HUM FROM fan_function WHERE TO_CHAR(CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = ADDDATE(CURRENT_DATE(), -#{each})
ORDER BY CREATE_DATE ASC

select.foreach: SELECT IFNULL(CREATE_DATE, ADDDATE(CURRENT_DATE(), -#{each})) CREATE_DATE , IFNULL(AVG(ILLUMINANCE), 0) AS AVG_ILL , IFNULL(MAX(ILLUMINANCE), 0) AS MAX_ILL , IFNULL(MIN(ILLUMINANCE), 0) AS MIN_ILL FROM illuminance_function

mapper.select:
SELECT IFNULL(CREATE_DATE, ADDDATE(CURRENT_DATE(), -#{each})) CREATE_DATE , IFNULL(AVG(AIR_QUALITY), 0) AS AVG_AIR , IFNULL(MAX(AIR_QUALITY), 0) AS MAX_AIR , IFNULL(MIN(AIR_QUALITY), 0) AS MIN_AIR FROM fan_function WHERE TO_CHAR(CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = ADDDATE(CURRENT_DATE(), -#{each})
ORDER BY CREATE_DATE ASC
